title: Search Keyword
gist: SNB institutional page (raw title 'Search Keyword' is a scraper artifact) describing the banking services the SNB provides to the Swiss Confederation. No monetary-policy signal, but it documents the SNB's role as fiscal agent issuing Confederation bonds and money market debt register claims by auction via SIX Repo.

insights.claim: Under arts. 5(4) and 11 of the National Bank Act, the SNB provides banking services (payment transactions, liquidity management, securities custody) to the Swiss Confederation for remuneration, but free of charge where they facilitate monetary policy implementation.
insights.speaker: SNB Research
insights.so_what: Clarifies the SNB's dual role as central bank and the Confederation's banker, with the monetary-policy mandate taking pricing priority.
insights.quote: they are offered free of charge if they facilitate the implementation of monetary policy

insights.claim: The SNB issues Confederation bonds and money market debt register claims (MMDRCs) on behalf of the Confederation by auction via the SIX Repo Ltd electronic trading platform, covering both long-term capital needs and short-term funding.
insights.speaker: SNB Research
insights.so_what: Identifies SIX Repo as the primary-market venue for Swiss sovereign debt issuance, relevant for anyone tracking Swiss government funding.
